title: PokéAPI Resources, URL API, Pagination Shapes, and Fair-Use Policy
description: User input becomes a full fetch destination, URL strings are concatenated, pagination fields are assumed present, and repeated commands bypass the API request to cache every resource. Learners cumulatively produce fixed-origin typed PokéAPI request policy through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Hold scheme and authority in trusted configuration and map commands only to enumerated PokéAPI resource paths.
Validate resource kind, numeric identifier or canonical constrained name, and preserve requested versus resolved identity.
Use URL and URLSearchParams for encoded path and limit or offset values while rejecting slash, control, oversized, and unexpected input.
